channel.title: Comments on: Deschutes Brewery: Black Butte Porter, Ep. 156
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul Leone
item.dc:creator: Paul Leone
item.description: Thanks Tom! I knew when I started this thing that I needed a guy like John who lives this business everyday - he has a great way of speaking beer geek, and thats why I love him!!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Tom! I knew when I started this thing that I needed a guy like John who lives this business everyday – he has a great way of speaking beer geek, and thats why I love him!!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: Really enjoyed the discussion about The Business of Brewing. Please keep it up!
item.content:encoded: Really enjoyed the discussion about The Business of Brewing. Please keep it up!
